attributes.title: Historical Dashboard

elements.expression:
kibana
| selectFilter
| essql 
  query="SELECT socialDistancing.proximityDetections, timestamp 
         FROM \"mdx-frames*\" 
         ORDER BY timestamp DESC 
         LIMIT 1"
| math "socialDistancing.proximityDetections"
| metric "" 
  metricFont={font size=48 family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" align="center" lHeight=48 color={switch {case if={eq 0} then="green"} {case if={gt 0} then="red"} default="black"}} 
  labelFont={font size=14 family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" align="center" color="#000000"} metricFormat="0,0"
| render

kibana
| selectFilter
| essql 
  query="SELECT
  rois.info.restrictedAreaViolation,
  timestamp,
  rois.count,
  CASE
    WHEN rois.info.restrictedAreaViolation = 'true' 
         THEN rois.count
         ELSE 0
  END AS violationCount
FROM \"mdx-frames*\"
WHERE rois.type = 'Person'
  AND rois.id = 'hazard_zone_1'
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 50
"
| math "max(violationCount)"
| metric "" 
  metricFont={font size=48 family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" align="center" lHeight=48 color={switch {case if={eq 0} then="green"} {case if={gt 0} then="red"} default="black"}} 
  labelFont={font size=14 family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" align="center" color="#000000"} metricFormat="0,0"
| render

kibana
| selectFilter
| essql 
  query="SELECT
  info.confinedAreaViolation,
  info.confinedAreaViolationObjects,
  timestamp,
  CASE 
    WHEN info.confinedAreaViolationObjects IS NULL THEN 0
    ELSE (
      LENGTH(REPLACE(info.confinedAreaViolationObjects, '|', ',')) 
      - LENGTH(
          REPLACE(
            REPLACE(info.confinedAreaViolationObjects, '|', ','),
            ',',
            ''
          )
        )
      + 1
    )
  END AS objectCount
FROM \"mdx-frames*\"
ORDER BY timestamp DESC
LIMIT 1
"
| getCell column="objectCount"
| metric "" 
  metricFont={font size=48 family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" align="center" lHeight=48 color={switch {case if={eq 0} then="green"} {case if={gt 0} then="red"} default="black"}}
| render

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "### Proximity Violations" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "##### Humanoid close to Human" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "### Restricted Area Violations" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "##### Human in Restricted Area" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "### Confined Area Violations" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""

kibana
| selectFilter
| demodata
| markdown "##### Humanoid not in Confined Area" 
  font={font family="'Open Sans', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif" size=18 align="center" color="#000000" weight="bold" underline=false italic=false}
| render css=""
